title: BenchCore Requirements Schema
description: Validates the structure of each requirement entry in requirements.json

requirement_id.description: Unique requirement identifier in format BENCHCORE-REQ-NNNN

source_ids.description: Array of source document identifiers that substantiate this requirement

statement.description: Detailed requirement statement describing what must be implemented or documented

accepted_for_agentx.description: Whether this requirement has been accepted as within scope for Agent_X implementation

scope.description: Scope of the requirement (e.g., benchmark, deferred, out_of_scope)

artifact_refs.description: File paths to benchmark artifacts that implement or document this requirement

positive_tests.description: Test names for positive (expected behavior) test cases

negative_tests.description: Test names for negative (error handling) test cases

sabotage_tests.description: Test names for sabotage (adversarial/overclaim detection) test cases

positive_tests.description: When accepted_for_agentx is true, at least one positive test must be defined
